title: Neville D'Almeida: Cronista da Beleza e do Caos
original_title: Neville D'Almeida: Cronista da Beleza e do Caos
overview: This film seeks to rescue the role of filmmaker Neville D'Almeida by using many rare images, numerous interviews, vast archival and audiovisual material.
